---
title: "debug_perf.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\debug\debug_perf.py"
loc: 46
complexity: 5
logic_score: 6.55
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 6.62
overall_score: 4.53
---

## Intent
The `debug_perf.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on run_profile, PerformanceProfiler, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via run_profile, PerformanceProfiler, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 20 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `run_profile`
- `PerformanceProfiler`
- `execute`
